visualSystem.direction: NanoGL-inspired native WebGL stage: saturated neon cyan, acid yellow, hot red, violet shadows, hard-edge geometry, shader grain, scanlines, and camera-linked motion.
visualSystem.source: Programmatic assets created in-repo by Codex; no external stock assets and no NanoGL source code copied.

assets.usage: Reference geometry for archive gate / hard-edge visual language.
Reference sprite for neon index marks and future WebGL texture conversion.
Creates color noise and displacement textures at runtime because no image-generation tool was available in this session.
